title: AI Companion (NPC Autopilot)
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot. v3.7.2: Movement engine rewrite — caster-aware positioning, Dash adds movement, post-action reposition, multi-movement speed support. v3.7.1: Fixed concentration detection, innate/limited spell consumption, per-turn cast tracker. v3.6.0: Archetype-aware tactics.
